name: IdsEdwVbbRuleDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT V.VBB_RULE_SK, V.VBB_RULE_ID, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, V.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, V.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, V.VBB_RULE_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.VBB_RULE V LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON V.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_transform_main AS (SELECT VBB_RULE_SK, VBB_RULE_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, VBB_RULE_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_source WHERE VBB_RULE_SK <> 0 AND VBB_RULE_SK <> 1), cte_transform_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS VBB_RULE_SK, 'UNK' AS VBB_RULE_ID, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS VBB_RULE_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_transform_na AS (SELECT 1 AS VBB_RULE_SK, 'NA' AS VBB_RULE_ID, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'NA' AS VBB_RULE_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_final AS (SELECT * FROM cte_transform_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_transform_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_transform_na) SELECT VBB_RULE_SK, VBB_RULE_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, VBB_RULE_DESC, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_final
